items.title: Iran says it has hit US base in Bahrain, as it launches strikes across region
items.dek: Huge plumes of black smoke were seen rising from an area near the headquarters of the US Navy's Fifth Fleet in Manama, Bahrain.
items.body: Huge plumes of black smoke were seen rising from an area near the headquarters of the US Navy's Fifth Fleet in Manama, Bahrain.

items.title: Bowen: A dangerous moment, but US and Israel see opportunity not to be missed
items.dek: Israel and the US believe Iran's regime is vulnerable, dealing with an economic crisis and the aftermath of protests.
items.body: Israel and the US believe Iran's regime is vulnerable, dealing with an economic crisis and the aftermath of protests.
